description: Morning brief 2026-04-20. Nifty opened 24,338.15 (-0.063% gap-down). Intraday hit low 24,241 / high 24,420. Ceasefire expires Tuesday 04-21 (T-1). Kushner+Witkoff Islamabad talks today. Brent $97-98 on Hormuz re-close. Opening bias: PARTIAL grade (flat-band, tilt wrong on primary forecast). Session direction: VOLATILE_SIDEWAYS_MILDLY_BULLISH (range 24,180-24,480, conviction 2/5). Key intraday trigger: Kushner-talks leak.

market_regime.label: CRITICAL_EXPIRY_BINARY
market_regime.key_risk: April 21 (Tuesday) ceasefire EXPIRY — 1 trading day from Monday open. Trump declared 'total violation' Sunday. Iran re-closed Hormuz Saturday after briefly opening Friday. Ceasefire status: CRITICAL but technically holding.
market_regime.dominant_risk: Binary outcome April 21: (A) Ceasefire extends — Nifty +1.5-2.5%, Brent $88-93, defense corrects; (B) Ceasefire collapses — Nifty -3 to -5%, Brent $108-118, gold spikes. No middle ground — either outcome is sharp.
market_regime.crude_pct_change_weekend: +1.34% (weekend rebound from $90.38 US-close Friday to $97-98 Sunday)
market_regime.crude_note: VOLATILE: Brent whipsawed $96 → $90 (Hormuz opens Friday after IST close) → $97-98 (Hormuz re-closes Saturday). India could NOT price the $90 level — Monday open reflects $97-98.
market_regime.crude_current_zone: WATCH_ZONE_CRITICAL ($95-100 — pre-expiry uncertainty, bouncing from Hormuz open/close whipsaw)
market_regime.regime_note: Weekend shock: Iran FM briefly opened Hormuz Friday after IST close (Brent crashed $96→$90), then Iran re-closed Hormuz Saturday ($90→$97-98 rebound). Trump Sunday accused Iran of 'total violation' — firing at French/UK ships in Strait. Kushner + Witkoff dispatched to Islamabad for Monday talks. Regime: CRITICAL_EXPIRY_BINARY — ceasefire expires TUESDAY, pre-positioning day Monday.

opening_bias.rationale: Brent at $97-98 = near Friday IST close level ($96.22) — not dramatically worse. BUT Trump violation accusation is negative sentiment. Kushner talks are positive signal. Net: flat-to-slight gap down. High uncertainty — could flip positive if overnight Kushner talks produce early signal.
opening_bias.key_morning_variable: Any statement from Kushner/Witkoff or Iran FM before NSE open (9:15am IST). If positive = gap up instead. If Iran hostile = gap down -0.5 to -1%.

session_direction.key_assumption: Monday is pre-ceasefire-expiry positioning day. Early session has already shown high intraday vol (Nifty swung 24,241 -> 24,420, ~180pt range within first hour). Constructive factors: Friday momentum carryover (DMART, IRCON, SUZLON), financial heavyweights supportive (NIFTY Financial Services +0.67%), GIFT Nifty 24,449 suggested bulls were positioned. Negative factors: Brent rebound to $97-98 on Hormuz re-close, Trump "total violation" accusation, Kushner/Witkoff Islamabad talks still in progress (outcome unknown intraday). Expect choppy range with modest upside bias as market pre-prices ceasefire extension (55% probability per binary matrix), but hedging into Tuesday expiry will cap upside. HCLTECH results Tuesday PM add event-risk overlay.
session_direction.brent_forecast: $96-99 intraday (elevated on Hormuz re-close, capped by Kushner diplomacy signal)

extension_signal_midday.description: Kushner/Witkoff Islamabad talks leak positive by Indian close. Brent slips to $95-96. Nifty rallies into close.

choppy_range_bound.description: Talks ongoing with no clear signal by close. Market drifts sideways with large intraday swings. FIIs wait-and-see.

escalation_or_talks_fail.description: Negative leak from Islamabad, Iran FM rejects extension, Brent spikes to $100+. Sharp intraday reversal.

key_risks: Kushner/Witkoff talks outcome — any negative leak before 3:30 PM IST close
Iran FM response to Trump "total violation" accusation
Hormuz vessel-traffic status (re-closed Saturday; tracking needed)
HCLTECH pre-results jitters (April 21 PM, M013 applies)
FII April 17 official and April 20 provisional data
Brent above $100 would trigger defensive rotation
key_opportunities: SUZLON/Renewables: momentum intact — if Brent softens, additional leg up
Defense (IRCON, MAZDOCK, PREMEXPLN): structural orderbook underpins even as war premium eases
MRPL / Refiners: Brent at $97-98 (not $90) caps GRM recovery — P017 still 3★
IndiGo: slight beneficiary of stable (not spiking) crude
SETFGOLD: HOLD into April 21 — do NOT sell ahead of binary

ceasefire_binary_matrix.key_signal: April 20 Kushner/Witkoff talks in Islamabad — any positive signal = pre-pricing of extension

stocks_to_watch.reason: P025 check date April 22. Estimated at ~₹1,120-1,140 on April 17 — already above P025 target range ₹1,050-1,100. Binary outcome: ceasefire extends → likely corrects to ₹1,050-1,100 (P025 RIGHT), ceasefire collapses → spikes ₹1,150-1,200+ (P025 WRONG/ABOVE). P030 correction thesis active (target ₹1,010-1,060 by April 30 if extension confirmed).

Q4FY26 results announced April 21 POST-MARKET (simultaneously with ceasefire expiry day). M013 applies. SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT confirmed 3x. Prediction P028: stays below ₹1,430 by April 28. Monitor closely — double event risk (ceasefire + results same day).

P029 active (target ₹123-127 by April 26 if ceasefire extends 3+ days). HOLD full position through April 21. DO NOT SELL before ceasefire resolution. If ceasefire collapses: gold ₹136-145. If extension confirmed + stable 3 days: sell 30-40% of position near ₹126-128.

P026 check date April 22 (target ₹92-96) — WILL SCORE WRONG. IRFC at ₹104.80. P010 check April 29 (target ₹85-95) — also heading WRONG. Monitor whether ceasefire extension brings PSU infrastructure re-rating toward ₹110+.

P017 target ₹200-210 by May 8. If ceasefire extends and Brent falls to $88-93, GRM recovery accelerates — P017 probability rises to 4★. If Brent hits $90, MRPL could see strong recovery from ₹183 toward ₹195-205.

Q4FY26 results April 23 (Thursday). M013 applies. SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT pattern. With WIPRO -2.83% on guidance and IT sector down 25% YTD, consensus expectations reset lower — less sell-on-news risk than TCS but M013 cap still applies. Monitor FY27 guidance for direction signal.

P001 check date April 25 (target <₹260). WILL SCORE WRONG — SWIGGY at ₹271-273. No catalyst for breach. Note: P001 was the earliest prediction; its failure marks the end of the near-52wk-low technical thesis.

+5.33% April 17 at ₹52.93. If ceasefire extends and Brent falls below $90, renewables sector gets tailwind. No active prediction. Consider P031 (SUZLON tests ₹58-62 on ceasefire extension + Brent <$90) at next morning brief if ceasefire extends.

prompt_for_morning_brief: MORNING BRIEF 2026-04-20 (Monday): (1) REGIME CHECK FIRST: Any overnight statement from Kushner/Witkoff from Islamabad? Any Iran FM response? Ceasefire still holding? (2) Score opening bias — forecast FLAT_TO_SLIGHT_GAP_DOWN ~-0.25% (GIFT Nifty ~24,270). Compare against actual NSE open. (3) Brent direction at Asia open — is it at $97-98 (negative) or moving lower on diplomacy signal (positive)? (4) ASTRA MICRO open price — above or below ₹1,100? (P025 pre-assessment). (5) SETFGOLD direction — is gold retreating on extension optimism or holding on violation news? (6) FII April 17 official data and April 20 provisional — net buyer or seller? (7) HCLTECH price action ahead of April 21 results. (8) CRITICAL NOTE: April 21 = ceasefire expiry + HCLTECH Q4 results — double binary. Pre-position carefully. (9) P025 and P026 check April 22 — pre-assess with April 20 close. (10) Any Hormuz vessel traffic update — has Hormuz re-opened or is it still contested?

key_events_this_week.impact: HIGH — pre-ceasefire expiry diplomatic effort. Positive signal = Nifty recovers to 24,500. Failure = pre-expiry gap down Tuesday.

key_events_this_week.event: ⚡ CEASEFIRE EXPIRY + HCL Tech Q4 results (post-market)
key_events_this_week.impact: CRITICAL — most important day since April 8. Dual binary: geopolitical resolution AND IT earnings. Expect extreme volatility.

key_events_this_week.event: P025 (ASTRA MICRO) + P026 (IRFC) check dates + Tech Mahindra Q4 results
key_events_this_week.impact: HIGH — P025 likely RIGHT/ABOVE, P026 certain WRONG.
HIGH — M013 applies. Sell-on-news base case. FY27 guidance is key variable.
MEDIUM — Both expected WRONG. Scorecard update.

active_promoted_patterns: M013 (IT Regime Risk Filter — cap IT confidence at 2★ in active geopolitical regime)
FORECAST_PAT005 (Diplomatic Restart Trigger — 25-30% probability after talks failure)
observing_patterns: TALKS_FAILED_WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN (AMENDED — 1-2 day swing pattern only, not 7D+)

portfolio_summary.note: Estimated values — pending official mark-to-market. Nifty +1.26% week, defense/renewables outperformed. Key drivers: IRCON +8.65%, SUZLON +5.33%, DMART +4.52%, MRPL +4.69% on Friday.
portfolio_summary.biggest_position_risks: IRFC (₹105 vs ₹130 avg = -19.2% loss, 200 shares), SWIGGY (₹271 vs ₹299 avg = -9.3% loss), MRPL (₹183 vs ₹196 avg = -6.8% loss)
portfolio_summary.biggest_winners: ASTRA MICRO (₹1,130 est vs ₹562 avg = +101% gain), SUZLON (₹53 vs ₹41 avg = +30.6%), COAL INDIA (₹432 vs ₹346 avg = +24.9%)

scoring_queue.expected: ABOVE_RANGE or RIGHT depending on ceasefire outcome

opening_bias_actual.scoring_note: Logged forecast (eod_wrap_2026-04-17): FLAT_TO_SLIGHT_GAP_UP +0.15% (GIFT est 24,390). Actual: Nifty opened 24,338.15 (-0.063% gap-down from 24,353.55). GIFT Nifty preopen was ~24,449 (would have suggested gap-up +0.39%). Direction tilt was wrong (predicted up, got down) but magnitude within FLAT band (|actual|<0.1%) — PARTIAL credit. NOTE: a mid-cycle weekly_review_2026-04-19 update flipped the forecast to FLAT_TO_SLIGHT_GAP_DOWN -0.25% after weekend Trump-violation / Hormuz re-close news; that revised view had the correct direction but also overstated magnitude (-0.25% vs actual -0.063%).
opening_bias_actual.data_provenance: News reports 2026-04-20 AM (Republic World, News24, Open Magazine) — GIFT Nifty 24,449, Nifty open 24,338.15, Sensex open 78,442.18.
